name: Bag of Holding
description: This bag can hold up to 500 blocks, not exceeding a volume of 52 cubic studs. The bag weighs 15 blocks regardless of its contents.

name: Cloak of Invisibility
description: While wearing this cloak, you can use a {{Bonus Action}} and a charge to invisible.

name: Flame Tongue
description: You can speak a command word to ignite this sword, causing it to deal an additional 2d6 fire damage.

name: Javelin of Lightning
description: When thrown, this javelin transforms into a bolt of lightning, dealing additional lightning damage.

name: Ring of Protection
description: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while wearing this ring.

name: Staff of Fire
description: This staff can be used to cast several fire-based spells, including Fireball and Wall of Fire.

name: Alchemist's Fire
description: A sticky, adhesive fluid that ignites when exposed to air. It deals fire damage to creatures on impact.

name: Armor of Invulnerability
description: This suit of armor grants the wearer complete immunity to all non-magical damage.

name: Dragonhide Armor
description:
Crafted from the hide of a dragon, this armor provides resistance to specific element based on the color of the majority of the dragon scales used to make it:  
{{resistance}}

name: Cloak of Protection
description: This magical cloak increases the wearer's AC and provides a +1 bonus to all saving throws.

name: Plate of Etherealness
description: This plate armor allows the wearer to phase into the Ethereal Plane for short periods, granting the wearer advantage on Stealth checks when in the Ethereal Plane.

name: Armor of Speed
description: This light armor increases the wearer's movement speed and a charge can be used to take an extra round in combat.

name: Shield of Deflection
description: This magical shield grants the wearer a +2 bonus to AC and allows the user to deflect ranged attacks, granting them a chance to deflect a projectile using a charge and a reaction.

name: Armor of Resistance
description: This armor grants resistance to one type of damage.

name: Lightning Armor
description: This armor crackles with electrical energy, granting the wearer resistance to lightning damage and the ability to deal 1d6 lightning damage to attackers who hit the wearer with a melee attack as a {{Reaction}}.

name: Armor of Shadow
description: This armor allows the wearer to meld into shadows, granting advantage on Stealth checks and resistance to necrotic damage.

name: Celestial Armor
description: This radiant armor glows with divine light, granting the wearer resistance to radiant damage and the ability to use a charge and a {{Reaction}} to add their Charisma modifier to their AC while wearing it.

name: Cloak of Shadows
description: This cloak blends seamlessly with shadows, granting the wearer advantage on {{Stealth}} checks in dim light or darkness.

name: Cloak of Resistance
Cloak of Regeneration
description: This cloak allows the wearer to regenerate 1 hit point every 10 minutes while they are {{Conscious}} and below {{=10 + attuned.skill_checks.skill:medicine}}.

name: Cloak of Protection Against Fiends
description: This cloak grants the wearer advantage on saving throws against fiends and better insight into finding them, additionally granting resistance to {{Necrotic}} damage.

name: Ring of Protection Against Fiends
Cloak of Flight
description: This cloak allows the wearer to fly for 1 hour per day.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
description:
This cloak enhances the wearer's ability to move quietly. It grants advantage on Stealth checks and resistance to being detected by magical means.

As an {{Action}}, you may put the hood up or down. While the hood is up, {{Perception}} checks have {{Disadvantage}} when trying to recognize you.

Notably this cloak gives off no magic.

name: Cloak of Spell Turning
description: This cloak reflects spells targeted at the wearer back at the caster. It can deflect any spell that requires a saving throw.

name: Cloak of Camouflage
description: This cloak allows the wearer to blend into their environment, granting advantage on Stealth checks when in natural terrain (forests, hills, etc.).

name: Enchanted Dagger
description: A dagger imbued with minor magical properties that deal additional force damage.

name: Book of Minor Spells
description: A tome containing a few basic spells. Must be able to use books for spells, such as a {{Wizard}} or a {{Pact of the Tome}} {{Warlock}}.

name: Mirror of Opposite
description: A small mirror that, when gazed into, shows a reflection of the opposite of what you truly desire.

name: Boots of Speed
description: Magical boots that allow the wearer to move at a faster pace.

name: Sword of Frost
description: A sword that, when drawn, is surrounded by magical frost that deals cold damage.

name: Horn of Blasting
description:
A magical horn that, when blown, emits a powerful sonic blast that can cause deafness or damage. As an action you may use a charge to damage all creatures in a 24 stud cone from you that is audible up to 480 studs away.

Objects made of glass or crystall take an additional 5d6 {{Sonic}} damage.

When used, the attuned creature makes a {{Wisdom}} save DC{{15 - charges}}. On a failed save the horn explodes and deals 10d6 {{Fire}} damage to the user and all creatures within 4 studs of that creature.

name: Arcane Focus
description: A crystal or orb that allows a spellcaster to channel their magic more effectively.

name: Boots of Leaping
description:
These boots grant the wearer enhanced jumping ability, enabling them to leap great distances.

When performing a {{Long Jump}}, you can jump {{=(attuned.stat_strength * 2) * .8}} studs, and when performing a {{High Jump}}, you can up to {{=2 + (attuned.strength * 2)}} studs into the air.

name: Waterskin
description: A leather container for carrying water. Can carry 64 ounces of water. Mark 1 charge for 8 ounces.

name: Greatsword
description: A large, two-handed sword that deals massive damage.

name: Spiked Shield
description: A shield adorned with sharp spikes, dealing damage when used to bash.

name: Staff of Power
Wand of Fire
description: A wand that acts as a spell focus and grants access to several fire-based spells.

name: Ring of Mind Shielding
description:
This ring prevents the user from being affected by mind-influencing magic as long as the magical effect is equivilent to a Level 3 spell or lower. Above that you receive {{Advantage}} on any saves.

Your thoughts can not be read through any means without you allowing it.

name: Circlet of Telepathy
description:
A circlet that allows the user to use a charge and an {{Action}} to be able to communicate telepathically with others for 1 minute.

When communicating with someone, they instantly have a sense of who and where you are and hear you in their head as though you were speaking to them outloud. Your telepathic voice can not be changed or thrown.

name: Boomerang
description: A thrown weapon that returns to the user after being thrown if the attack misses.

name: Antidote Potion
description: A potion that cures poison and renders the consumed immune to poisonous effects for 1 minute.
